name: TitleMax Title Loans
description_short: TitleMax offers same-day title loans and secured lines of credit using your vehicle title, plus unsecured personal loans. Memphis location serving since 2007.
description_long:
TitleMax operates a title loan storefront in Memphis, TN (Summer Avenue location) that has been serving the local community since February 2007. The company specializes in providing fast cash solutions to consumers who need emergency funds but may have credit challenges.

The Memphis TN 9 location offers three primary products: (1) Title Pledges—secured loans where borrowers use their car title as collateral while keeping the vehicle and driving it; (2) Flex Lines of Credit—secured lines of credit also backed by vehicle titles that customers can draw from all at once or incrementally; and (3) Unsecured Personal Loans—both in-store and online flexible lines of credit that don't require collateral, available in select states (AZ, DE, ID, KS, MO, MS, SC, TN, TX, UT, WI).

This location stands out for its bilingual staff, extended hours (open until 7pm on Mondays and Fridays), same-day cash approval, and acceptance of most credit types. The store emphasizes keeping payments manageable while securing competitive rates. Customer reviews on Google average 5.00/5 stars with 481+ reviews, frequently highlighting specific staff members like Nicole, Joyce, and Jonathan for professionalism and knowledge.

The primary caveat is that title loans are high-interest secured debt instruments—while the website emphasizes competitive rates and approval speed, the cost of borrowing against a vehicle title is typically significantly higher than traditional bank loans. Customers should understand that defaulting on a title pledge could result in vehicle repossession.
pros: Same-day cash approval and funding for qualified applicants
Accepts most credit types, not solely dependent on credit score
Allows customers to keep and continue driving their vehicle while using title as collateral
Bilingual staff available at this location
Extended hours: open until 7pm Monday and Friday, 9am-4pm Saturday
Google rating of 5.00/5 stars across 481+ customer reviews
Multiple product options: title pledges, flex lines of credit, and unsecured personal loans
cons: Title loans typically carry interest rates significantly higher than traditional bank loans (rates not disclosed on website)
Risk of vehicle repossession if unable to repay title loan
Unsecured personal loans only available in 10 states; customers in other states limited to collateral-based products
best_for: Consumers with poor or fair credit who need emergency cash within 1-2 days
Vehicle owners facing temporary financial hardship who want to keep using their car
Borrowers in Tennessee seeking local, in-person loan processing with same-day funding
diagnosis: TitleMax's Memphis location is best for employed individuals with vehicles who need $500-$5,000 in emergency cash within 24 hours and have fair/poor credit. The critical caveat is that title loans are expensive short-term debt—customers should only pursue this if unable to access payday alternatives, personal loans, or credit union PALs, and should have a clear plan to repay quickly to minimize interest costs.
services: Title Pledges (secured loans using vehicle title as collateral)
Flex Lines of Credit (secured credit lines backed by vehicle titles)
Line of credit management and online account access
Credit check (as part of underwriting, though credit score not primary factor)
